api_endpoints.notes: Google Vertex AI / AI Studio image generation
Returns image URLs or base64; supports 1024x1024, 1792x1024, 1024x1792
Supports audio input and output via modalities field
Returns float32 or base64-encoded vectors; up to 3072 dimensions
Returns float32 or base64-encoded vectors; up to 1536 dimensions
Returns audio stream; supports mp3, opus, aac, flac, wav, pcm

models.notes: 6 voices: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer

api_endpoints.notes: Supports mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm

models.notes: Supports 57 languages; charged per minute of audio
